title: Only PVP
body:
# 🎮 Only PVP

### 🔥 Perfect for Competitive Players!

Only PVP is a lightweight modpack crafted for those who thrive in the heat of battle. Whether you're a casual duelist or a high-stakes gladiator, this pack ensures your PvP experience is smooth, responsive, and visually stunning.

## ✨ Features
- 🖼️ Enhanced Graphics: Mods to make your game look better without sacrificing performance.
- ⚔️ PvP-Focused Mods: Improve combat mechanics and responsiveness for a seamless experience.
- 🚀 Optimized for Performance: Lightweight mods ensure smooth gameplay, even in intense battles.

Jump into the fray with Only PVP and dominate your opponents with style! 💥
